NOVA TECH SOLUTIONS — EMPLOYEE HANDBOOK (v4.2, Effective: January 1, 2025)

=============================================================================
SECTION 1: WORKING HOURS AND ATTENDANCE
=============================================================================

1.1 Standard Working Hours
The standard workweek at Nova Tech Solutions consists of 40 hours, Monday through
Friday. Core hours are 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM in the employee's local time zone.
Employees are expected to be available and responsive during core hours.

1.2 Remote Work Policy
Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week after completing a 90-day
onboarding period. Remote work requests must be submitted to the direct manager
at least 48 hours in advance via the HR portal. Fully remote roles are defined
separately in individual employment contracts.

1.3 Overtime and Compensation
Overtime is defined as hours worked beyond 40 hours in a single workweek.
Non-exempt employees receive 1.5x their base hourly rate for overtime.
Overtime must be pre-approved in writing by the department head.

1.4 Attendance and Punctuality
Employees are expected to maintain punctual attendance. Three unexcused absences
within a 90-day rolling window will trigger a formal performance review.

=============================================================================
SECTION 2: LEAVE POLICIES
=============================================================================

2.1 Paid Time Off (PTO)
Full-time employees accrue PTO at the following rates:
  - Year 1-2:    15 days per year  (1.25 days/month)
  - Year 3-5:    20 days per year  (1.67 days/month)
  - Year 6+:     25 days per year  (2.08 days/month)

PTO must be approved by the direct manager and requested at least 5 business
days in advance for periods of 3 days or more. Unused PTO of up to 10 days may
be carried over to the following calendar year. Any balance above 10 days is
forfeited on December 31.

2.2 Sick Leave
Employees receive 10 sick days per calendar year, non-accruing. Sick leave does
not carry over and is not paid out upon termination. A doctor's certificate is
required for sick absences exceeding 3 consecutive days.

2.3 Parental Leave
Primary caregivers receive 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave upon the birth,
adoption, or foster placement of a child. Secondary caregivers receive 4 weeks
of fully paid parental leave. Leave must commence within 12 months of the
qualifying event. Employees must have completed 12 months of continuous service
to be eligible for parental leave.

2.4 Bereavement Leave
Employees are entitled to 5 paid bereavement leave days for the death of an
immediate family member (spouse, child, parent, sibling). 3 days are provided
for extended family members (grandparent, in-law, aunt/uncle).

=============================================================================
SECTION 3: COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS
=============================================================================

3.1 Salary Review Cycle
Performance-based salary reviews occur annually in March. The company targets
a 3–5% merit increase pool. Individual increases are determined by the
performance rating on a scale of 1 to 5, where 5 is exceptional.

3.2 Health Insurance
Nova Tech Solutions covers 90% of individual health insurance premiums and 70%
of dependent premiums. Dental and vision coverage is included in the base plan
at no additional cost. Open enrollment runs each November for coverage effective
January 1 of the following year.

3.3 Retirement Plan (401k)
The company matches 100% of employee contributions up to 4% of gross salary.
Employees are immediately vested upon enrollment. The 401k plan is administered
by Fidelity Investments.

3.4 Professional Development Budget
Each full-time employee receives an annual professional development budget of
$2,000, which may be used for courses, certifications, conferences, or books.
Budget resets on April 1 each year. Unused budget does not carry over.

=============================================================================
SECTION 4: CODE OF CONDUCT
=============================================================================

4.1 Anti-Harassment Policy
Nova Tech Solutions maintains a zero-tolerance policy for harassment, bullying,
or discrimination based on race, gender, age, religion, disability, national
origin, or sexual orientation. Violations will result in immediate investigation
and potential termination.

4.2 Confidentiality and Data Protection
Employees must not disclose proprietary company information, client data, or
trade secrets to external parties. All employees are required to sign an NDA
on their first day. Violations of the confidentiality policy are grounds for
immediate termination and may result in legal action.

4.3 Conflict of Interest
Employees must disclose any outside business interests or investments that may
conflict with their responsibilities at Nova Tech Solutions. This includes
consulting for competitors or holding more than 5% equity in a competing firm.

=============================================================================
SECTION 5: PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT
=============================================================================

5.1 Performance Review Cycle
Formal performance reviews are conducted twice per year: mid-year in June and
year-end in December. Reviews use a structured competency framework covering
technical skills, collaboration, initiative, and impact.

5.2 Performance Improvement Plan (PIP)
Employees receiving a performance rating of 1 or 2 for two consecutive reviews
may be placed on a Performance Improvement Plan. A PIP runs for 60 days and
includes weekly check-ins with the manager and HR. Failure to meet PIP targets
may result in termination.

5.3 Promotion Criteria
Promotions are merit-based and require: (a) a performance rating of 4 or above
in the most recent annual review, (b) manager recommendation, and (c) approval
by the department director.

=============================================================================
SECTION 6: EQUIPMENT AND TECHNOLOGY
=============================================================================

6.1 Company Devices
Nova Tech Solutions provides a laptop and necessary peripherals to all full-time
employees. Devices remain the property of the company and must be returned upon
termination. Employees may request a $500 home office stipend to purchase a
monitor, keyboard, or ergonomic accessories.

6.2 Software and Licensing
All software installed on company devices must be approved by the IT department.
Personal software, games, or unlicensed tools are prohibited on company devices.

6.3 Security Compliance
Employees must enable full-disk encryption and set a screen lock timeout of no
more than 5 minutes on all company devices. Multi-factor authentication (MFA)
is mandatory for all company accounts.

=============================================================================
END OF DOCUMENT — Nova Tech Solutions HR Department
=============================================================================
